All right, way in day step one. So we are going to be going through a three-step process. This first step is more of the administrative stuff, but it is very important to make sure that we have everything squared away before we get into chatting. So first step, contract double check. There is typically, let's say you signed up 10 challengers in any given week. There could be one or two people where something is not correct on their contract. Maybe they forgot to sign it. Maybe their credit card information is not correct. Make sure that you have a stack of your contracts and that everybody is good to go before you move forward with way in day. If they do have a problem on their contract, that should be the first thing that you are getting rectified before you give them everything else. So make sure you do that. Number two, after that is completed, you are going to head over to the scale, whether you have just a traditional scale or an in-body or a scale with an omron. You want to head over to the scale and you want to get their weight and get their body fat percentage. These are the things that we are going to be tracking for the challenge and the goals that they have set. So we want to record that weight and the body fat on your tracking sheet. So the tracking sheet is an Excel sheet that we are going to record in our Google sheet that we are going to be going into a little bit later on in this training. So you will totally know how to do it at that point. But you want to record their weight and their body fat. You can just type the body fat right next to the weight in the weight column and it will be perfect. So make sure you record that so then you know exactly what it is that they are starting at. Then you are going to have them download the apps that you use at your gym. So we know they will be using Boxer to communicate with you and send pictures and things like that. So have them download Boxer and then right away add them as a contact. Otherwise you might be searching for a while to find that person, people with similar names. So add them as a contact right away so you can start that communication. Next you want to friend them on Facebook and or have them friend you and then that way you can add them to your group if they are not in there yet. They should be in your group from the messages that you sent out before when they but if not that is a way that you can get them in there for sure. Number six you have them like your page and then complete their first check in. So have them like your business page which they might already have but have them check in because they are due to check in every time they come to your gym on those bi-weekly meetups or check ins and so you want to show them how to do that so when they pull in the parking lot that is the first thing that they do and they share on social media that they are at your gym. Next give them the food list so they that is the first part of this is the approved food list. You want to give that to them and then finally head to the office. Get ready to talk or it doesn't have to be in office wherever you sit down and talk with them about their nutrition, about their goals, about their supplementation. You want to head to that area now the administrative stuff is done and then we will move into step two.
